title: sphaeromeria compacta
intro: Sphaeromeria compacta, also known as the compact globe mallow, is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern United States and Mexico, characterized by its globe-shaped flowers and compact growth habit. The medicinal properties of Sphaeromeria compacta include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been used to treat a range of health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Sphaeromeria compacta is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be made by infusing the plant's flowers and leaves in hot water or a solvent like ethanol or glycerin.
